company_core.name: Noma Security
company_core.description: Noma Security offers an AI security and governance platform designed to provide visibility and control throughout the AI lifecycle, from model development to application runtime. The platform utilizes API-based integrations and real-time threat detection to manage security and compliance risks in AI applications across various environments.

founders.name: Niv Braun
founders.background:
Niv Braun served as a Group Manager at Verint from 2020 to 2022, where he led a 50-person team in developing a new cybersecurity product line. Prior to that, he held various roles at Verint, including Product Team Lead and Outbound Product Manager. His experience also includes serving as a Cyber Security Group Manager in the Israeli Military Intelligence - Unit 8200 from 2015 to 2016.

---

founders.name: Alon Tron
founders.background:
Alon Tron served as the Data Science Lead at Interai from 2020 to 2022, where he utilized machine learning models and computer vision algorithms to enhance enterprise applications. Prior to that, he held multiple roles at Israeli Military Intelligence, including Development Consultant and Tech Lead in Unit 8200, where he guided development teams in technology upgrades and requirement design. He holds dual Bachelor of Science degrees in Computer Science and Computational Biology from UC San Diego and The Hebrew University of Jerusalem.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/alon-tron

agent_output.markdown:
# Noma Security | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
Noma Security is a B2B AI security and governance platform that provides visibility and control across the full AI lifecycle — from model development through application runtime — using API-based integrations and real-time threat detection. The company closed a $100M Series B on July 1, 2025, bringing total funding to $132M [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489). Headcount has surged 30% in 90 days, signaling aggressive post-raise scaling [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489).

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Massive, recent capital event:** A $100M Series B closed July 1, 2025 — this is a freshly funded company with significant runway and deployment plans worth understanding now [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• **Hypergrowth hiring signal:** 30% headcount growth in 90 days on a base of 91 employees suggests rapid team expansion, likely accelerating GTM and product buildout [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• **Strategic investor validation:** Backers include Databricks Ventures, Ballistic Ventures, Evolution Equity Partners, and SVCI (Silicon Valley CISO Investments) — a mix of strategic and specialist cyber investors that signals strong domain credibility [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• **Timely market positioning:** The platform targets AI security and governance, a category with rapidly expanding enterprise demand as AI deployments proliferate [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

---

## Company Snapshot
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Founded | 2023 |
| HQ | Not found in table |
| Employees | 91 (+30.0% 90d) |
| Products | AI security and governance platform; API-based integrations, real-time threat detection across AI lifecycle |
| Customers | B2B enterprises |
| Total Funding | $132,000,000 |
| Last Round | $100,000,000 — July 1, 2025 |
*Last updated: July 1, 2025*

---

## Founders

**Niv Braun** — Co-Founder & CEO | linkedin.com/in/niv-braun
Braun led a 50-person team at Verint (2020–2022) building a new cybersecurity product line, with prior roles as Product Team Lead and Outbound Product Manager at the same firm. He also served as a Cyber Security Group Manager in Israeli Military Intelligence Unit 8200 (2015–2016), providing deep offensive/defensive security grounding relevant to Noma's domain. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

**Alon Tron** — Co-Founder & CTO | linkedin.com/in/alon-tron
Tron served as Data Science Lead at Interai (2020–2022), applying machine learning and computer vision to enterprise applications. He previously held Development Consultant and Tech Lead roles in Israeli Military Intelligence Unit 8200, and holds dual B.S. degrees in Computer Science and Computational Biology from UC San Diego and The Hebrew University of Jerusalem. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

---

## Key Signals
• **[Hiring]** Headcount up 30.0% in 90 days (to 91 employees) — indicative of aggressive post-Series B scaling — Source: Noma Security Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• **[Web Traffic]** Site traffic up 4.7% in 30 days (49,760 visits) — modest but positive demand signal — Source: Noma Security Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• **[Funding]** Series B closed July 1, 2025; current stage: Series B — Source: Noma Security Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

---

## In the News
No recent news available. [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

---

## Meeting Prep

**Key questions to ask:**
• The $100M Series B closed just weeks ago — what is the specific capital allocation plan, and what milestones (ARR, customer count, product milestones) is the team targeting before a Series C? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• Headcount is up 30% in 90 days — which functions are being hired into most aggressively (GTM, engineering, research), and how does the team think about maintaining culture and execution quality at this pace? [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• With Databricks Ventures as a strategic backer, is there a formal partnership or distribution relationship with Databricks, and how does the platform integrate with data and AI infrastructure providers more broadly? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)
• Both founders come from Unit 8200 and enterprise cybersecurity backgrounds — how does that inform the product's threat model, and what differentiates Noma's AI-specific detection from incumbents extending existing security platforms into AI? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/56284489)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo focused on a live AI application security use case, and ask for early customer references — ideally from enterprises with mature AI deployments — to validate real-world efficacy and GTM traction post-Series B.
